<?php namespace Twilio\Rest; use Twilio\Rest\Taskrouter\V1; class Taskrouter extends TaskrouterBase { /** * @deprecated Use v1->workspaces instead. */ protected function getWorkspaces(): \Twilio\Rest\Taskrouter\V1\WorkspaceList { echo "workspaces is deprecated. Use v1->workspaces instead."; return $this->v1->workspaces; } /** * @deprecated Use v1->workspaces(\$sid) instead. * @param string $sid The SID of the resource to fetch */ protected function contextWorkspaces(string $sid): \Twilio\Rest\Taskrouter\V1\WorkspaceContext { echo "workspaces(\$sid) is deprecated. Use v1->workspaces(\$sid) instead."; return $this->v1->workspaces($sid); } }
